name: wxcode-admin-bento-overview
title: Bento Ops Overview
description: Operations overview dashboard built on a bento-grid layout — asymmetric tiles of varied sizes spanning a neutral canvas. One hero metric, an inline SVG area chart, KPI pills, donut chart, activity feed, mini-table, and status tile. Multi-accent palette: indigo, teal, amber, rose.

query.en: Build me a business operations overview dashboard using a bento-grid layout — asymmetric tile sizes, hero metric, SVG chart, KPI tiles, activity feed, donut, mini-table, and status tile.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a business operations overview dashboard using a bento-grid layout — asymmetric tile sizes, hero metric, SVG chart, KPI tiles, activity feed, donut, mini-table, and status tile.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
